CE1.justification: No execution occurred; the user is left to reconstruct the task entirely on their own — maximum orientation cost shifted back to them.

CE2.justification: Null final response — not terse-and-complete, just absent; the task was not addressed.

CE3.justification: No routing was performed or signalled; the user would have to inspect the workspace to learn nothing happened.

CE4.justification: No artifacts were produced, so there is trivially nothing to orphan on interrupt.
